title: sessions_spawn bypassed sandbox inheritance for ACP runtime
description: The spawnSubagentDirect function validates agent allowlists when spawning cross-agent subagents but does not check whether the child agent's sandbox configuration is at least as restrictive as the requester's. A sandboxed session can spawn a subagent targeting an agent with sandbox mode 'off', causing the child to run unsandboxed and escape the requester's sandbox boundary.
